age_range.evidence: Young people aged 15 to 25 and adults (aged 26 and above)

countries.evidence: Participants from across Australia were recruited

fieldwork_year.evidence: An online national cross-sectional survey was conducted between January and March 2024.

gender_split.evidence: 50.9% (n = 1,805) identified as cisgender women and 45.5% (n = 1,613) as cisgender men. [Table 1]

sample_size.evidence: Three thousand five hundred forty-nine individuals (895 young people; 2,654 adults) completed the survey.
